ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player related to these stats */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance */,
  "tackle" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "assist" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "sack" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "pd" INTEGER /* Passes defended */,
  "int" INTEGER /* Interceptions */,
  "ff" INTEGER /* Forced fumbles */,
  "fr" INTEGER /* Fumble recoveries */,
  "def_td" INTEGER /* Defensive touchdowns */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Games played */,
  "fpts" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  "fpts_per_game" REAL /* Fantasy points per game */,
  "snap_count" INTEGER /* Number of snaps played */,
  "snap_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total team snaps played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Quarterback, Defensive Back) */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Group of positions (e.g., Offense, Defense, Special Teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player related to these stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "tackle" INTEGER /* Number of tackles */,
  "assist" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "sack" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "pd" INTEGER /* Passes defended */,
  "int" INTEGER /* Interceptions */,
  "ff" INTEGER /* Forced fumbles */,
  "fr" INTEGER /* Fumble recoveries */,
  "def_td" INTEGER /* Defensive touchdowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
